title: Invocation
description: One recorded capability-verb call — the provenance spine (agency/_invoke.py; Spec 153 Slice 6 coverage). SERVES an Intent and is PERFORMED_BY an Agent.

capability.description: The capability whose verb was invoked (e.g. 'develop').

verb.description: The verb name within the capability (e.g. 'maintain').

role.description: The verb's declared role (act / effect / read) — the read/mutate axis of provenance.
